items.title: HR Management
items.description: Recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, record keeping, and development program coordination.

items.title: Customer Service
items.description: Handling inquiries, resolving issues, maintaining satisfaction, and managing relationships (CRM).

items.title: Community Engagement
items.description: Building online communities, content strategy, fostering interaction, and managing feedback.

items.title: Data Analysis
items.description: Proficient in Excel, data visualization tools, and basic statistical software for insights.

items.title: Communication
items.description: Strong written and verbal skills, adept at engaging diverse audiences effectively.

items.title: Problem-Solving
items.description: Ability to assess complex issues, devise effective solutions, and implement them efficiently.

items.title: Leadership & Teamwork
items.description: Effective collaborator and leader focused on enhancing group performance and achieving goals.

items.title: Time Management
items.description: Skilled in managing multiple tasks, meeting deadlines, and ensuring accuracy in all duties.

items.title: Project Management
items.description: Understanding of project lifecycles, planning, and execution principles (Google Certified).
